headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Garmin (GRMN) After Its Strong Three Year Share Price Run?
summary: This article examines whether Garmin's share price still reflects fair value or if expectations have already been priced in, and explores what the current number might mean for you. Garmin's stock closed at US$241.90, with returns of 29.1% over 1 year, 19.5% year to date and very large gains over 3 years, alongside a 3.7% decline over the last week and a 0.3% move over the past month. Recent news coverage has focused on Garmin's position in consumer durables and how its product lineup fits...
